case_title: DAVID SOULE VS. YASEMIN SERRA BASARAN-CRAWFORD ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOULE, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT BASARAN-CRAWFORD, YASEMIN SERRA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BASARAN-CRAWFORD, YASEMIN SERRA
